query_normalized: the role of cognitive dissonance in justifying unethical ai use psychology
rationale: The paper focuses on architectural approaches to Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) and does not measure, discuss, or provide a baseline for the psychological mechanism of cognitive dissonance or the human justification of unethical behavior. It falls under the "off-domain entirely" rejection rule as it addresses AI system design rather than the human psychological factors surrounding AI use.
